title: Stagger Cascade, Bento Spotlight, Gradient Flow, Glare Tilt, Morphing Text
description: Five live UI pattern demos: scroll stagger, cursor spotlight bento, @property gradient text, glare tilt cards, and blur morph words.

drops.title: Staggered Scroll Cascade
drops.description: Cards slide + fade in as they enter the viewport with configurable per-column stagger delay.
drops.concept: IntersectionObserver triggers CSS transitions with staggered delays based on card index within its grid row. Configurable distance and delay let you feel the difference between subtle and dramatic entrance choreography.
drops.source: Scroll-stagger entrance pattern popularised by Josh W Comeau and Codrops

interaction.click: Tune stagger delay and distance via panel sliders

drops.title: Bento Spotlight Grid
drops.description: Glass bento cards where a radial-gradient spotlight follows your cursor and cards tilt in 3D perspective.
drops.concept: Each card tracks mousemove and sets CSS custom properties --mx/--my for a radial-gradient spotlight overlay (::after). Combined with a JavaScript-driven 3D perspective tilt, the interaction creates a depth illusion while the glowing spotlight reveals surface texture — a premium landing-page staple in 2026.
drops.source: Magic UI Spotlight / Linear landing page bento pattern

interaction.mouse: Hover cards to see spotlight and tilt
interaction.click: Adjust intensity and tilt angle via panel

drops.title: @property Gradient Flow Text
drops.description: Text gradients that fluidly rotate hue using CSS @property — three type hierarchies each at different speeds.
drops.concept: CSS @property defines typed custom properties (--hue, --hue2, --hue3) that can be natively animated. By animating these to 360 and using them inside hsl() in a gradient, the colours flow continuously — something impossible with traditional CSS variable animation. Includes a shimmer variant using --shimmer-pos.

interaction.click: Speed sliders in panel control each text element's animation duration

drops.title: Glare Tilt Cards
drops.description: Cards that tilt in 3D and show a conic-gradient glare highlight following the cursor position.
drops.concept: On mousemove, each card computes the cursor angle (atan2) and position relative to its bounds. A conic-gradient (::after) produces a glare beam that rotates to match the light direction, while CSS perspective + rotateX/Y creates the tilt. The combined effect simulates a physical reflective surface.
drops.source: Robin Decroon magnetic/glare experiment · Magic UI Glare Hover

interaction.mouse: Hover cards to see glare and tilt effect
interaction.click: Panel sliders tune tilt angle and glare intensity

drops.title: Morphing Text
drops.description: Words blur-dissolve into each other, a typewriter cycles phrases, and a letter wave pulses through characters.
drops.concept: Three distinct text morphing patterns: (1) blur-morph swaps words using paired elements transitioning filter:blur + opacity to simulate a dissolve; (2) a typewriter effect using setInterval to add/remove characters with a CSS cursor-blink; (3) a letter-wave that cycles an 'active' class through individual character spans using translateY + color transitions.

interaction.click: Panel controls morph interval and typewriter speed
